toast.reloadSkippedNoWallpaper: No wallpaper is configured, so there was nothing to reload

error.notInstalled: linux-wallpaperengine was not found in PATH. Please check whether it is installed correctly.
error.assetsMissing: Wallpaper Engine assets were not found. Configure the assets directory in settings.
error.opengl: OpenGL initialization failed. Check driver and compositor compatibility.
error.autoRecovered: Auto recovered to the last available layout

panel.title: Wallpaper-Engine Wallpaper Selector
panel.compatibilityQuickCheckConfirm: Scan all wallpapers for extra property compatibility? This may take some time.
panel.folderInvalid: Wallpaper source directory is invalid or inaccessible.
panel.searchPlaceholder: Search wallpapers by name or ID
panel.propertiesLoadFailed: Failed to load wallpaper properties. This wallpaper format may not be supported yet, or this wallpaper may not run correctly
panel.noEditableProperties: This wallpaper has no editable extra properties yet
panel.propertiesNotice: Only directly editable properties supported by this plugin are shown here
panel.emptyAll: No wallpapers found in the source directory
panel.emptyFiltered: No wallpapers match the current filters

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.description: Color used for the bar widget icon

enableExtraPropertiesEditor.label: Enable extra property editor
enableExtraPropertiesEditor.description: Show wallpaper-specific extra properties in the panel sidebar when available

assetsDir.label: Wallpaper Engine assets directory
assetsDir.description: Optional: assets path used by linux-wallpaperengine

defaultScaling.label: Default scaling mode
defaultScaling.description: Default scaling mode when no custom value is set

defaultClamp.label: Default clamp mode
defaultClamp.description: Default edge handling mode used when rendering wallpapers

defaultFps.label: Default FPS
defaultFps.description: Default frame rate limit for wallpapers

defaultNoFullscreenPause.label: Prevent fullscreen pause
defaultNoFullscreenPause.description: Prevent pausing while fullscreen apps are running

defaultFullscreenPauseOnlyActive.label: Pause only active fullscreen
defaultFullscreenPauseOnlyActive.description: (Wayland only) Pause only when a fullscreen window is active

defaultMuted.label: Mute wallpaper by default
defaultMuted.description: Start wallpapers in mute mode by default

defaultNoAutomute.label: Do not mute when other apps play audio
defaultNoAutomute.description: When enabled, wallpaper audio keeps playing even while other applications are outputting sound

autoApplyOnStartup.label: Auto apply on startup
autoApplyOnStartup.description: If at least one screen has a configured wallpaper, run the engine automatically on startup
